name: scroll-goblin
description: Scroll Goblin: a suite of mini apps, games, and activities (decoupled modular monorepo)

scripts.dev: pnpm build:shared && concurrently -n shared,api,web -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm dev:shared" "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:web"
scripts.build: pnpm build:shared && pnpm --filter @scroll-goblin/api build && pnpm --filter @scroll-goblin/web build
